cards.title: Formal Language
cards.governance_note: Define allowed symbolic structures so systems can parse, validate, and interpret them.

cards.title: Grammar
cards.governance_note: Make grammar rules explicit rather than relying only on examples.

cards.title: Syntax and Semantics
cards.governance_note: Separate valid form from valid meaning and responsible use.

cards.title: Symbolic Representation
cards.governance_note: Review what symbols make visible, what they omit, and how downstream systems interpret them.
